---
title: "Spotify_analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Importing libraries

```{r library, include=FALSE}

```

## Import required files

```{r}
df <- read.csv('C:/data/spotify_wrapped_2025_top50_songs.csv')
```
